parameters.jsCode:
// ── Build Groq prompt ────────────────────────────────────
const d = $input.first().json;

const systemPrompt = `You are a customer support ticket classifier for a SaaS company.
Analyze the support ticket and return ONLY a valid JSON object — no markdown, no explanation.

Classify into EXACTLY ONE category:
- Billing
- Technical Support
- Sales
- Security
- Account Management

Assign EXACTLY ONE priority:
- Low    (general question, no urgency)
- Medium (issue affecting work but has workaround)
- High   (significant business impact, no workaround)
- Critical (data loss, security breach, complete outage)

confidence is an integer 0-100 reflecting your certainty.
reasoning is one concise sentence.

Return ONLY this JSON structure:
{"category": "...", "priority": "...", "confidence": 0, "reasoning": "..."}`;

const userPrompt = `Subject: ${d.subject}\nMessage: ${d.message}`;

return [{
  json: {
    ticket_id:    d.ticket_id,
    name:         d.name,
    email:        d.email,
    subject:      d.subject,
    message:      d.message,
    system_prompt: systemPrompt,
    user_prompt:   userPrompt,
    retry_count:   d.retry_count || 0
  }
}];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ticket_classifications
  (ticket_id, category, priority, confidence, reasoning, model_used, raw_response)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ticket_id }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  {{ $json.confidence }},
  '{{ $json.reasoning }}',
  '{{ $json.model_used }}',
  '{{ $json.raw_response }}'
);

UPDATE tickets
SET status = 'CLASSIFIED', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE ticket_id = '{{ $json.ticket_id }}';

INSERT INTO ticket_audit_logs (ticket_id, event_type, event_data, workflow_name, node_name)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code: Parse & Validate AI Response').item.json.ticket_id }}',
  'TICKET_CLASSIFIED',
  '{"category": "{{ $('Code: Parse & Validate AI Response').item.json.category }}", "priority": "{{ $('Code: Parse & Validate AI Response').item.json.priority }}", "confidence": {{ $('Code: Parse & Validate AI Response').item.json.confidence }}}',
  '02 - AI Classification',
  'PostgreSQL: Store Classification'
);

meta.description: Receives classified ticket data, calls Groq LLM API, validates JSON response, stores classification in PostgreSQL, and triggers routing workflow.
